description_long: This storage box features a robust, rectangular design with a two-tone color scheme: a light gray top section and a darker metallic lower body. The front and sides are accented with a blue panel and a yellow horizontal strip, likely serving as a latch or label area. The top appears to be a removable or hinged lid, with subtle geometric detailing and a digital or printed marking on one side. One side displays a row of small green indicator lights, suggesting electronic or smart functionality, while another side has a small, vertical slot or handle. The box's construction suggests it is made from durable plastic or metal, suitable for urban environments such as garages, sidewalks, or storage rooms. Its overall appearance is modern and utilitarian, designed for secure storage and easy access.
description: A modern, rectangular storage box with a gray top, dark metallic body, blue front panel, and yellow accent, featuring indicator lights and a possible electronic interface.
description_view_0: The front view shows the blue panel with a yellow strip and a digital marking '128' on the upper right, highlighting the main access side.
description_view_1: This side view features a row of green indicator lights above the blue panel and a small vertical slot on the lower right, suggesting electronic or smart features.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the blue panel and yellow strip without any digital markings or indicator lights, presenting a simpler, less interactive side.
description_view_3: This side view is similar to view 2 but lacks indicator lights and slots, showing a plain blue panel and yellow strip.
